depositFees(uint256).details: Caller must hold DEPOSITOR_ROLE. Pulls USDC via transferFrom.

params.amount: USDC amount to deposit as fees

returns._0: Total USDC balance managed by the vault

convertToAssets(uint256).notice: Converts a share amount to its equivalent asset amount (rounded down)

convertToShares(uint256).notice: Converts an asset amount to its equivalent share amount (rounded down)

depositFees(uint256).notice: Accepts fee payment from an authorised market contract

totalAssets().notice: Returns the total assets held in the vault
